prestazioni: LS9 6.2L Supercharged V8 (engine code: LS9) forced induction upgrade via Kenne Bell 3.6L Mammoth supercharger kit with 105mm billet crank pulley, 4.5-inch inlet pipe, and dual 75mm throttle bodies, pushing boost to 14 PSI (stock: 9.0 PSI) for 850+ WHP on E85 fuel with supporting ARP head studs and forged internals (Mahle pistons, Callies crankshaft, Manley H-beam rods).

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: RPM Transmissions Level 5 built 6L90E automatic with billet flexplate, Sonnax Smart Shell, and upgraded solenoids, paired with a South Bend dual-disc clutch (for manual variants) and a G-Force GSR-4 4-speed dog-ring transmission with sequential shifter for track use.

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CTS-V-specific valving), Eibach Pro-Series anti-roll bars (28mm front, 25mm rear), and Brembo GT 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake kit with 20" forged BBS FI-R wheels (9.5" front, 11.5" rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/20 rear).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (CTS-V Gen 3-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with gloss black accents on the grille and badges.

Custom interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position seats (CTS-V-specific mounting brackets), Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with quick-release hub, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay (via Seibon) with a Motec C127 dash logger replacing the stock cluster.

Aerodynamic enhancements including a custom carbon fiber hood with LS9 heat extractor vents, a Vorsteiner V-FF102 rear spoiler (CTS-V-specific), and a custom titanium exhaust system by Armytrix with 4.5" dual outlets and electronically controlled valves for adjustable backpressure.
